description: Unified design tokens manifest for Razzoozle flat design system. Normalizes tokens from design.md, packages/web/src/index.css, and console/tokens.css into a single canonical schema.

primary.description: Violet brand color. Primary CTA, pinned in console. White text OK.

secondary.description: Dark ink, headings. Pinned in console.

accent.description: Amber accent default. RUNTIME-themeable. The #FF2D6E in index.css @theme is unused static seed, overwritten on apply. Use ink text on accent fills, never white-on-accent on cream surfaces.
accent.note: Canonical default is amber #ff9900; set in packages/common/types/theme.ts + validators/theme.ts

cream.description: Front-of-house background. STATIC (:root-only). Cream field for landing, lobby, player phone, trophies, join/auth.

ink.description: Stage background (shared result /r/:id). STATIC (:root-only). Manager/display/podium/recap now cream-converted via GameWrapper force.

shadow-flat.description: Single shadow rung (no elevation ladder). STATIC (:root-only). Recipe, not a ladder.

compact.description: Compact radius for chips, badges, tightly-spaced UI.

game-fg.description: In-game foreground text. STATIC (no theme field). Shell sets #0E1120 (ink) for cream-converted surfaces. Bare :root default is WHITE (#ffffff). NEW cream shells MUST set --game-fg: #0E1120 themselves.
game-fg.note: Default #ffffff in :root, overridden by shell to #0E1120 for cream fields

answer-text.description: Uniform ink label on answer tiles (all 4 colors). RUNTIME-themeable. Runtime default is ink #0B0B12; previously drifted to white.

accent-contrast-text.description: Ink text on accent fills. STATIC (:root-only). Never white-on-accent on cream surfaces.

ink-family.description: Console text palette (STATIC). Replaces text-gray-*00/700/600/500/400 via migration mapping (T-0).

surface-family.description: Console surface hierarchy (STATIC). Replaces bg-gray-50/100/200/300 via migration mapping (T-0). surface-5 for toggle/hover steps.

line.description: Hairline borders, dividers (ListRow separator, form boundaries). STATIC (:root-only). Contrast on surface-3 = 1.09:1 (fails WCAG for meaning-bearing; acceptable as decorative divider).
line.warning: Contrast 1.09:1 on surface-3; use for decorative dividers only, not meaning-bearing distinctions

ring-selected.description: Focus ring on dark backgrounds (rarely used in light console). STATIC (:root-only).

status.description: Status badge colors (D3). Always pair -bg with -text; never white text.

accent-derived.accent-contrast: color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary), black 34%), #1f2937 12%)
accent-derived.description: Derived from themed primary. Re-derived inside .console-shell from pinned primary, ensuring console stays amber even when game recolors.
accent-derived.note: color-mix() re-evaluates at paint time; tracks runtime theme automatically

answer-1.description: Tile fill (orange). Recolors to state-correct (green) or state-wrong (red) on reveal. Ring + ink label retained.

answer-tiles.rule: 1px hairline ring (#E2DDD2) + shape icon + ink label (#0B0B12) on every tile. On reveal: swap fill to state-correct/state-wrong in place; keep ring + label.

red.description: Team color; use derived -text for labels.

blue.description: Team color; use derived -text for labels.

green.description: Team color; use derived -text for labels.

yellow.description: Team color; use derived -text for labels.

bronze.label: white
bronze.note: WHITE label OK on bronze (only tier that takes white).

tiers.glow: Derived shadow per tier (box-shadow with color-mix transparency 82–84%)

correct.note: INK text. White fails (2.28:1). Soft wash: color-mix transparent 78%.

wrong.note: INK text. White fails (3.76:1). Soft wash: color-mix transparent 78%.

timer-track.description: Derived from text color at 22% opacity.

labels.description: 8-tone fixed set for fächer (labels). Maps to answer/team/state tokens + new values.

font-display.use: Display, headings, stage marquee (weight 800). NOT serif, NOT Inter/Roboto/Helvetica.

numerals.use: All numerals (score, timer, rank, PIN) to prevent reflow on update.

console-headings.description: Linear scale, no skips (D18). Page titles = h1, section titles = h2, card/group titles = h3.

spacing.note: Tailwind defaults apply. No custom spacing ladder defined in tokens. Console row density: default p-4 / compact px-4 py-2.

scrim.description: Dialog/modal overlay scrim. RUNTIME-themeable. MUST stay 0 in flat (legacy black scrim murks cream). bg-black/40 is the only sanctioned dark fill (on position:fixed full-screen modal overlays only).

notes.design_system: Flat only. Violet brand (--color-primary #7c3aed) + Amber accent (#ff9900 runtime default) + Cream field (#F4F1EA). Glass system fully removed (2026-07-17).
guardrails: No backdrop-blur/backdrop-filter anywhere in shipped code (grep gate).
No hardcoded hex colors in components; all colors via CSS custom properties.
Every answer tile carries 1px hairline ring (--border-hairline) + shape icon + ink label.
Never white text on cream-side fills (state-correct, state-wrong, tier gold/silver/diamant, amber accent). Use ink text (--answer-text #0B0B12).
No dark surfaces on cream field. Use bg-white + --shadow-flat; carve-out: bg-black/40 ONLY on position:fixed full-screen modal overlays.
--game-fg MUST be set to #0E1120 on every cream shell (default :root is white, renders invisible on cream).
notes.validation: python3 -m json.tool design.tokens.json (syntax). scripts/check-manager-tokens.sh <path> (design rules D1/D2/D10 grep gates).
notes.deprecations: Glass system removed. No @supports backdrop-filter, no .glass-* classes, no data-theme-style=glass value allowed.
notes.console_notes: Console shell (.console-shell) PINS brand tokens to fixed Razzoozle defaults, isolated from game theme recolor. Flat design language applies to both stage and console.
notes.token_mappings: Manager migration T-0: text-gray-* → text-[var(--ink-*)], bg-gray-* → bg-[var(--surface-*)], border-gray-* → border-[var(--line)]. Coverage 94.9% (390/411).
